title: Fether
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Fether-TEA.png]] |name=Fether |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] |system=[[Fether system/Legends|Fether system]] |coordinates=S-3 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Solenbaran Merchant Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial{{WEGCite|story=Money Troubles|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|text=''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'', Second Edition}} |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Ocsin]] |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Unidentified town (Fether)|Town]] |imports=[[Gervi fruit]]s |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|What's going on here?''"
"''I don't know—okay, who's got someone mad at them? Raise your hands.''" [All the crew members present raise their hands.]''|A freighter's captain and another crew member, upon being ambushed by bounty hunters on Fether||trans=1}} '''Fether''' was a [[Agriworld/Legends|farming world]] located on the [[Solenbaran Merchant Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] hosted a population of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Ocsin]] and was the site of a small [[Unidentified town (Fether)|spaceport town]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[Unidentified bounty hunter group|group]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Battle on Fether|ambushed]] the crew of a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] in the streets of the [[City/Legends|town]] due to the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Unidentified smuggler (Fether)|captain]] owing [[Currency/Legends|money]] to the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunters']] employer. The crew was subsequently chased to its ship and then left Fether. ==Description== Fether was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Fether system/Legends|Fether system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. The [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Solenbaran Merchant Route]] linked the planet to the [[Deltooine system/Legends|Deltooine]] and [[Ocsin system/Legends|Ocsin systems]], and the [[Issagra system/Legends|Issagra system]] lay at a distance of twelve [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel away from Fether. ==History== {{Dialogue|Bounty hunter|Okay, you slimy smuggler. You can come out now. We've been sent to get the money you owe on the ship.|Freighter's crew member|Bounty hunters—we've got bounty hunters after us?|Another crew member|How many payments have you missed on your ship?|Freighter's captain|A… few.|attr=A freighter's crew learns why it is being attacked on Fether|src=}} At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] delivered a shipment of [[Gervi fruit]] to Fether. Following the delivery, the freighter's crew wandered through the streets of a local [[Unidentified town (Fether)|town]]. When the crew members were in the center of the [[City/Legends|town]], about a block away from their [[Starship/Legends|starship]], a [[Unidentified bounty hunter group|group]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Battle on Fether|ambushed]] them, opening [[Lightfight|blasterfire]] on them. The [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] had been hired by a [[Loan shark|loanshark]] to capture the freighter's [[Unidentified smuggler (Fether)|smuggler captain]] and the rest of the crew due to the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] having missed out on loan [[Currency/Legends|payments]] for the ship. {{RPG|"[[Money Troubles]]"}} The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunters proceeded to chase the freighter's crew through the streets of the town. During the battle, the local [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] arrived at the scene of the fighting. In addition, one of the crew members rescued a small [[Youngling/Legends|child]] who had wandered into the street from getting accidentally injured, and the crew also evaded a vehicle that had veered out of control as a result of being hit by a stray [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Laser/Legends|bolt]]. Eventually, the freighter's crew reached its ship and left the planet, engaging the bounty hunters' modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|light freighter]], the ''[[Heroc's Slayer]]'', before leaving for the Issagra [[Star system/Legends|system]]. {{Endgame}} ==Inhabitants== A minor, isolated [[Agriworld/Legends|farming world]], Fether was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a substantial population of immigrated [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Ocsin]]. ==Locations== A small [[Farm/Legends|farm]] town that featured a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] was located on Fether. The town's streets were dusty and filled with crates as well as [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|vehicles]], such as [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] and [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]]. ==Behind the scenes== Fether was introduced in "[[Money Troubles]]," a [[roleplaying game]] adventure designed for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and included in the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|second edition]] of the game's rulebook. The book was authored by [[Bill Smith]] and published in [[1992]]. This article assumes the adventure plays out as described. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed Fether in grid square S-3. Despite the adventure being set during the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the entry for the ''Heroc's Slayer'' in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' erroneously claims that the group of individuals the freighter pursued to the Issagra system,{{CSWECite|II|36|''Heroc's Slayer''}} as depicted in "Money Troubles," was affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the predecessor of the New Republic.''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Money Troubles|book=Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|text=''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'', Second Edition}} {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Fether}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Fether |es=Fether }} [[Category:Agriworlds]] [[Category:Corporate Sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Solenbaran Merchant Route]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
